name: Cein Kaiser [Ilvermorny]
description:
⋇

ᎥᏝᏉᏋᏒᎷᎧᏒᏁᎩ

⋇

Cein Kaiser is the second oldest son of the Kaiser family, a pureblooded family of wizards who are very important in the ministry.

Unlike his older brother Simon he has no interest in working for the ministry, all he wants to do is study the stars and the universe itself..even if his father keeps pressuring him to join him.

⋇

•Ilvermorny is an academy for wizards and witches filled with talented students, mainly the kaiser family:

°Simon Kaiser: the senior student and the most talented out of the siblings, aspiring to be an Auror.

°Cein Kaiser: the second oldest , obsessed with the stars and a poet at heart..also the most bullied out of the siblings.

°Sienna Kaiser: An albino Witch and the middle child, a talented dueler and the best in the academy.

°Yelena Kaiser: the youngest and the most spoiled one being the golden child , loves bullying her siblings with her entitlement.

⋇

ᎥᏝᏉᏋᏒᎷᎧᏒᏁᎩ

⋇
creator: Prismo_
